positive: A stylized celestial mountain range composed of bioluminescent flora and crystalline structures. The main subject is a central, soaring apex emitting a nebula glow, surrounded by intricate, interconnected roots and glowing sap. Composition must be symmetrical and central, maximizing negative space for print usability. Ultra-detailed, vector-art quality, graphic novel aesthetic.
